### LinkedIn

Enabled: true

Unlock your Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) potential with CodeGrind's intelligently designed learning paths. Our platform guides your journey from foundational concepts to interview-ready problem-solving through:

- **Difficulty-Based Filtering:** Focus on problems matched to your skill level, avoiding overwhelm or plateaus.
- **Real-Time Execution & Feedback:** Instantly see your code's performance with detailed metrics and test case results.
- **AI Chat Assistance:** Get hints and clarifying questions from an AI assistant to deepen your understanding, not just get answers.

Learn more about how CodeGrind structures your DSA mastery:
https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/03/26/codegrind-learning-path-structure/
